list.name: Changes
list.comment: Added smoothing for player sync at client. Added sync betweet Java and UPS (When UPS shutdown, jail server restarting and wait when UPS will be started). TODO: Add Cache reflected + annotation system for automatic serialize packets; Add me.tongfei progress bar (Refactor console messages for to make it clearer). If possible, refactor code at client and UPS to be it clearer.

task.summary: Added multithread reading and writing. Edited protocol body.
JUPP updated Added jail server and new Network UDP protocol

Synced jail server with unity client. Added processing RTT by Network Engine. Fixed problem with delay by send packets (cause: selector.select(10)). Now when player connected to server, jail server creating new instance in playersPool (JailPools).
Refactored packet serialize/deserialize systems, refactored packet incoming/outgoing ids. Refactored disconnection reasons.
Refactored processing packets, receipt confirmation system not finished.
Receipt confirmation system finished. Renamed packet Ask to Ping.
Added disconnect packet logic. Need to fix something errors from client and add time out logic.

Fixed bugs in the client code and added time out. Improved RTT system (fixed dos on 0 RTT) and synchronized Unity Physics Server with Java server (UPS now work in 64+- fps and even frame controlled by java server)

Added initializer pools in UPS (Unity Physics Server). Added create player at UPS and delete him. Added JailPlayerFactory to create players. Added new message type for notice engine about disconnect player. New 'InnerException' packet. Added new values to JailPlayer (unityInstanceID, nickname, Vector3 position) and new functions addPlayerData, deletePlayerData.
Added client player sync. Todo: add delay between creation a player instance in UPS and sends client player sync. And add protection from unauthorized access.
Reorganized project structure. Added gameplay state machine (Spectator, Spawn, Death) to fix data races in UPS. Fixed TPS of player sync at client.

Edited local player sync between player and server (now client send inputs and server calculate player coordinates). TODO: Add sync between server and player coordinates at client. Fix jumps. ADD Cache reflected + annotation system for automatic serialize packets; Add me.tongfei progress bar, add sync between Java server and UPS (for example: When UPS off - off Java server)

Added sync between server and player coordinates at client. Fixed jumps. TODO: Review jumpDelayTime at client. Add Cache reflected + annotation system for automatic serialize packets; Add me.tongfei progress bar, add sync between Java server and UPS (for example: When UPS off - off Java server)

Added smoothing for player sync at client. Added sync betweet Java and UPS (When UPS shutdown, jail server restarting and wait when UPS will be started). TODO: Add Cache reflected + annotation system for automatic serialize packets; Add me.tongfei progress bar (Refactor console messages for to make it clearer). If possible, refactor code at client and UPS to be it clearer.

MESSAGE.value: Added multithread reading and writing. Edited protocol body.
JUPP updated Added jail server and new Network UDP protocol

Synced jail server with unity client. Added processing RTT by Network Engine. Fixed problem with delay by send packets (cause: selector.select(10)). Now when player connected to server, jail server creating new instance in playersPool (JailPools).
Refactored packet serialize/deserialize systems, refactored packet incoming/outgoing ids. Refactored disconnection reasons.
Refactored processing packets, receipt confirmation system not finished.
Receipt confirmation system finished. Renamed packet Ask to Ping.
Added disconnect packet logic. Need to fix something errors from client and add time out logic.

Fixed bugs in the client code and added time out. Improved RTT system (fixed dos on 0 RTT) and synchronized Unity Physics Server with Java server (UPS now work in 64+- fps and every frame controlled by java server)

Added initializer pools in UPS (Unity Physics Server). Added create player at UPS and delete him. Added JailPlayerFactory to create players. Added new message type for notify engine about disconnect player. New 'InnerException' packet. Added new values to JailPlayer (unityInstanceID, nickname, Vector3 position) and new functions addPlayerData, deletePlayerData.

Added client player sync. Todo: add delay between creation a player instance in UPS and sends client player sync. Fix sync tick count per second at client, and add protection from unauthorized access.
Reorganized project structure. Added gameplay state machine (Spectator, Spawn, Death) to fix data races in UPS. Fixed TPS of player sync at client.

Edited local player sync between player and server (now client send inputs and server calculate player coordinates). TODO: Add sync between server and player coordinates at client. Fix jumps. ADD Cache reflected + annotation system for automatic serialize packets;

Edited local player sync between player and server (now client send inputs and server calculate player coordinates). TODO: Add sync between server and player coordinates at client. Fix jumps. ADD Cache reflected + annotation system for automatic serialize packets; Add me.tongfei progress bar, add sync between Java server and UPS (for example: When UPS off - off Java server)

Added sync packet between UPS and client (id 12) and added extrapolation in client for smooth sync player position. Fixed jumps. TODO: Review jumpDelayTime at client. Add Cache reflected + annotation system for automatic serialize packets; Add me.tongfei progress bar, add sync between Java server and UPS (for example: When UPS off - off Java server)

Added smoothing for player sync at client. Added sync betweet Java and UPS (When UPS shutdown, jail server restarting and wait when UPS will be started). TODO: Add Cache reflected + annotation system for automatic serialize packets; Add me.tongfei progress bar (Refactor console messages for to make it clearer). If possible, refactor code at client and UPS to be it clearer. Fix jumps.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Added smoothing for player sync at client. Added sync betweet Java and UPS (When UPS shutdown, jail server restarting and wait when UPS will be started). TODO: Add Cache reflected + annotation system for automatic serialize packets; Add me.tongfei progress bar (Refactor console messages for to make it clearer). If possible, refactor code at client and UPS to be it clearer. Fix jumps.
